hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$' && npx --no-install prettier --write --single-quote --print-width 150 --tab-width 2 --trailing-comma none --arrow-parens always "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.py$' && ruff format --line-length 100 "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
